name: GHOSTFACE | Danny Johnson
description:
DD:DNE | Mentions of self-harm, detailed descriptions and mentions of murder + gore | Stalking + unhealthy relationship dynamics | AnyPOV | victim!user | long-ish intro

“is it too much to ask? for you, to end my life?”
(unestablished relationship (kind of)

[Roseville, Florida. 1993.]

It’s no secret that there’s a serial killer in your town. Wild words and rumors of a ghost-faced killer on the loose, victims of various ages and backgrounds killed in places they should feel most comfortable— home. All premeditated. No DNA. No traces of anything. Just the reports from Roseville Gazette’s freelance journalist, Jed Olsen.

Danny found your number in a phone book by chance, now he’s on the fence about whether or not he should make you the next star for a hit piece he’s writing.

“show you a trick where i could make you disappear..”

A/N:

HIDEY-HO! i’ve been thinking about him again. so guess what. alt scenario and remaster of my first danny bot. not that it’s interesting, but i’ve been really into dbd again although i haven’t played the game in a good 6 months or so.. i just really like the legion & the game’s interpretation of ghostface lol.. apologies for spelling mistakes or bad writing. not my strong suit.

TAG TIME!: ghostface, dbd, dead by daylight, danny johnson, jed olsen, m4a, horror

DISCLAIMER

my bots are made with OPENAI in mind!! i haven’t yet tested jllm with this, and i am probably not going to. use jailbreaks, utilize chat memory, and type more descriptively for better responses. if the bot speaks, misgenders, or anything similar— it is a JLLM issue, not the bot. i will not be adding jailbreaks to my bot descriptions anymore!

any bots tagged dead dove of mine are not coded or meant to have non/dubcon or any sort of abuse, but with the way llms are, the bot might push the subject into the roleplay which is out of my control.
creator: ilovelule
